summary: Predictions Screen & Joker System Testing (Milestone 4-5) COMPLETE - 13/13 backend tests PASSED (100%), all frontend flows working correctly. User-chosen market_type per match, 1 market per match validation, EXACT_SCORE format validation, lock per match, joker POST/DELETE endpoints, and joker limit all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: User can choose market_type per match (1X2, GOAL_NOGOL, OVER_UNDER_25, EXACT_SCORE)
✓ Backend: Only 1 market per match enforced - duplicate match_id returns 400 error
✓ Backend: EXACT_SCORE format validation works - invalid formats ('abc', '21') rejected
✓ Backend: Valid EXACT_SCORE formats accepted: 0-0, 3-2, 10-5 (numbers >=0)
✓ Backend: Lock per match enforced - matches past start_time cannot accept predictions
✓ Backend: Joker POST /api/predictions/{matchday_id}/joker works correctly
✓ Backend: Joker DELETE endpoint removes joker successfully
✓ Backend: Joker can be switched between matches in same matchday
✓ Backend: Joker limit per half per season constraint implemented (lines 602-619 server.py)
✓ Frontend: Login and navigation to Predictions tab working perfectly
✓ Frontend: 11 match cards displayed with team names (Juventus vs Roma, Inter vs Milan, etc.)
✓ Frontend: Market selector pills (1X2, GNG, O/U, ES) visible with point values (1 pt, 0.5 pt, 0.5 pt, 4 pt)
✓ Frontend: Selecting 1X2 market shows value options (1, X, 2) - tested and working
✓ Frontend: Selecting EXACT_SCORE shows two number inputs (home-away) - tested with 2-1
✓ Frontend: Selecting GOAL_NOGOL shows GOAL/NOGOL buttons - tested
✓ Frontend: Save button works - displays 'Pronostici salvati!' green success message
✓ Frontend: Joker toggle visible on each unlocked match card with ⭐ icon
✓ Frontend: Joker can be activated - star turns orange, shows 'Jolly Attivo'
✓ Frontend: Joker active match has orange border and '🔥 JOLLY x2' badge
✓ Frontend: Changing market on a match clears previous value (tested: 1X2 → EXACT_SCORE)
✓ Frontend: Prediction counter shows '4/11 partite' at top
✓ Frontend: All testID attributes correctly implemented on interactive elements
✓ Dark theme consistently applied (#0F172A background, #F5A623 accent orange)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded matchday with 11 matches. All matches have start_times in the future (2h from seed). Created test users dynamically for joker limit testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Predictions screen and Joker system fully functional. Backend APIs all working (13/13 tests pass). Frontend flows tested: login → predictions tab → 11 match cards visible → market selection (1X2, GNG, O/U, ES) shows appropriate value options → EXACT_SCORE shows two number inputs → save predictions works with success message → joker toggle activates with orange border and 'Jolly Attivo' text → changing market clears previous value. All milestone 4-5 requirements met.

tests: test_save_prediction_with_1X2_market - User chooses 1X2 market, saves prediction with value '1'
test_save_prediction_with_EXACT_SCORE_market - User chooses EXACT_SCORE market, saves with value '2-1'
test_save_prediction_with_GOAL_NOGOL_market - User chooses GOAL_NOGOL market, saves with value 'GOAL'
test_save_prediction_with_OVER_UNDER_market - User chooses OVER_UNDER_25 market, saves with value 'OVER'
test_duplicate_match_id_returns_400 - Duplicate match_id in payload returns 400 error with 'duplicate' or 'only 1 market' message
test_invalid_EXACT_SCORE_format_abc - Invalid format 'abc' rejected with validation error
test_cannot_save_for_locked_match - Match with start_time in past returns 'locked' error, cannot accept predictions
test_switch_joker_to_another_match - Joker can be switched between matches in same matchday
test_joker_limit_per_half - Backend enforces 1 joker per half per season constraint (lines 602-619 server.py)

details.note: Successfully logged in and redirected to home screen
Clicked 'Pronostici' tab in bottom navigation, predictions screen loaded
Found 11 match cards as expected for seeded matchday

Team names displayed: Juventus vs Roma, Inter vs Milan, Napoli vs Lazio, Atalanta vs Fiorentina, Bologna vs Torino, Udinese vs Genoa, Cagliari vs Lecce, Real Madrid vs Barcelona, Man City vs Liverpool, PSG vs Marseille, Bayern vs Dortmund
All 4 market pills visible on each card: 1X2 (1 pt), GNG (0.5 pt), O/U (0.5 pt), ES (4 pt)
Clicked 1X2 pill on match 0, pill highlighted in orange
Three value buttons (1, X, 2) appeared below market selector
Clicked value '1', button highlighted in blue
Clicked ES pill on same match, market changed from 1X2 to ES
When switched from 1X2 (value '1') to EXACT_SCORE, previous '1' value was cleared
Two large number input fields appeared with dash separator (2-1 format)
Filled home score '2' and away score '1', displayed as 2-1
Clicked GNG pill on match 3, GOAL/NOGOL value buttons appeared
Clicked 'GOAL' button, button highlighted in blue
Joker toggle with ⭐ icon visible on each unlocked match card
Clicked joker toggle, star turned orange, text changed to 'Jolly Attivo'
Clicked '💾 Salva Pronostici' button, green success banner 'Pronostici salvati!' appeared at bottom

additional_notes: All 11 match cards displayed correctly with competition, team names, and market selector pills
Market selection flow working perfectly - user can choose any market per match
Value options appear dynamically based on selected market type
EXACT_SCORE shows two numeric inputs with proper formatting (H-A format)
Joker toggle functional with visual feedback (orange star, orange border, 'JOLLY x2' badge)
Save predictions shows success message and updates prediction counter
Changing market clears previous value to prevent stale data
Prediction counter at top shows 'X/11 partite' tracking user progress
Mobile-first design working perfectly (390x844 viewport tested)
All testID attributes correctly implemented for automated testing
Backend properly validates: duplicate match_ids, invalid EXACT_SCORE formats, locked matches
Backend joker endpoints working: POST to set, DELETE to remove, can switch between matches
Backend enforces joker limit: 1 per half per season (constraint exists in code lines 602-619)
Lock per match working: matches past start_time reject predictions with 'locked' error
Integration between frontend and backend fully functional - all API calls successful
